---
title: "Fig 3n + ED Fig 5b - PA-Rac1 C450M precursor (Pre/Act/Post)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  variant: "C450M"
  pdf_name: "C405_length.eps"
  length_y_limit: !r c(-40, 30)
---

<!--
================================================================================
  STAGE-1 PRECURSOR wrapper for Fig 3n + ED Fig 5b, PA-Rac1 C450M variant
  (Rac1 nucleotide-binding mutant — defective Rac1 activation).
================================================================================
  Variant-specific data loading happens HERE; the deterministic
  pivot / save / plot pipeline is delegated to:
      ../../templates/fig03n_parac1_precursor.Rmd

  Body N = 22 ROIs (matches published Fig 3n N = 57; the difference reflects
  cell/event aggregation in the consolidator).

  Pipeline -> downstream consolidator
      figures/Fig03_Arp3/fig03n_parac1_gc_soma_length.Rmd
  which reads:
      C450M_actin_int.rds  (produced here)
      C450M_length.rds     (produced here)

  NB: legacy PDF filename ``C405_length.eps`` (not ``C450M_length.eps``)
  is preserved for byte-equivalent reproduction.

  Essentiality: Essential. Pairs with the KO and T17N sibling precursors.

  Original 195-line monolithic wrapper refactored 2026-05-12: variant-
  specific CSV-loading + actin-table concatenation kept inline; the
  generic pivot/save/plot pipeline moved to the canonical template.
-->

## Step 1: libraries + load saved environment

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(viridis)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "actin_quant_C450M.RData", sep = "/")
load(file = saved_path)
```

## Step 2: Build `length_input` from per-cell *_length*.csv files

```{r message=FALSE}
folder_path <- Path_1
file_paths  <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "_length(.*)csv$",
                          recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
folder_name <- basename(dirname(file_paths))

data_list <- file_paths %>% map(read.csv)
for (n in 1:length(data_list)) {
  data_list[[n]]$Exp <- folder_name[n]
}

length_input <- data_list %>% reduce(bind_rows)
```

## Step 3: Build `actin_input` from Actin_int_C405M + LSM980 tables (N=22)

```{r}
Actin_quant <- rbind(Actin_int_C405M, Actin_int_C405M_LSM980)

Actin_quant$Series <- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")
Actin_quant$roi    <- rep(1:22, each = 3)
Actin_quant$Image  <- Actin_quant$Label %>% str_remove("\\.tif:.*")
Actin_quant$Site   <- "GC"
Actin_quant$exp    <- "WT_PA_Rac1_C450M"

actin_input <- Actin_quant
```

## Step 4: include canonical pivot/save/plot template

```{r child = "../../templates/fig03n_parac1_precursor.Rmd"}
```

## Step 5: persist working environment

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "actin_quant_C450M.RData", sep = "/")
save.image(file = saved_path)
```
